subcodes.first_line: O namesake of His Holiness the Sacrifice! Hast thou forgotten thine own title? That glorious namesake quaffed the cup of martyrdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمی حضرت ذبیح ایا لقب خویش را فراموش نمودی سمی جلیل جام جانفشانی نوش نمود
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @martyrs and martyrdom, @spiritual transformation, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
